relationships.description: ISA is the organizing concept for IAR4D
Applied in DRC to address challenges
Applied in Rwanda to address challenges
Applied in Uganda to address challenges
Conducted at the Lake Kivu Pilot Learning Site
Established through the Participatory Action Research approach
Initiated the creation of International Public Goods
Initiated the use of market binding contracts
Utilized ICT application for knowledge pooling
Led to the appreciation of indigenous knowledge systems
Propelled collective soil and water conservation
Helped build social capital to overcome challenges
Context of agricultural growth in Africa
